top_drug_detail.moa: Passive immunity for category III exposures

post_acute_syndrome: Essentially uniformly fatal once symptomatic - no post-acute phase

top_drug_detail.moa: No single drug; antivenom is definitive

post_acute_syndrome: Chronic disability: amputation, chronic kidney disease, chronic pain, PTSD

top_drug_detail.moa: Mass drug administration and crusted scabies

top_target_detail.name: nuclear receptor subfamily 3 group C member 1

post_acute_syndrome: Secondary bacterial infection -> post-streptococcal (acute rheumatic fever, glomerulonephritis)

top_drug_detail.moa: No disease-specific antiviral; fluid resuscitation for severe dengue
Recombinant chimeric yellow fever–dengue vaccine (serostatus restrictions)

top_target_detail.name: heat shock protein family A (Hsp70) member 5

post_acute_syndrome: Post-dengue fatigue syndrome / prolonged post-viral fatigue
note: WHO groups dengue+chikungunya as one NTD entry; split here.

top_target_detail.name: nuclear receptor subfamily 3 group C member 1
calcium voltage-gated channel subunit alpha1 A

post_acute_syndrome: Neurocysticercosis -> chronic epilepsy (leading cause of acquired epilepsy in endemic areas)
Chronic biliary disease; cholangiocarcinoma (Opisthorchis/Clonorchis)
Chronic anaemia, malnutrition, growth & cognitive impairment (children)
Chronic hepatic/urogenital fibrosis; bladder cancer risk; female genital schistosomiasis
Chronic lymphoedema / elephantiasis, hydrocele

top_drug_detail.moa: Oral alkyl phospholipid for VL and CL
Historic first-line; resistance in parts of India

post_acute_syndrome: Post-kala-azar dermal leishmaniasis (PKDL) after visceral leishmaniasis
Chronic dermatitis, vision loss/blindness, onchocerciasis-associated epilepsy / nodding syndrome

top_drug_detail.moa: No approved antiviral; symptomatic arthritis management

post_acute_syndrome: Post-chikungunya chronic inflammatory rheumatism / chronic arthralgia
note: WHO groups dengue+chikungunya as one NTD entry; split here.

post_acute_syndrome: Chronic Chagas cardiomyopathy + digestive megasyndromes (megaesophagus/megacolon)
post_acute_source: WHO Chagas fact sheet; Nunes 2018 Circulation

top_target_detail.name: killer cell lectin like receptor C2
heat shock protein family D (Hsp60) member 1

post_acute_syndrome: Conjunctival scarring -> trichiasis -> irreversible blindness

top_drug_detail.moa: Microtubule inhibitor; cysticidal adjunct to PAIR/surgery

post_acute_syndrome: Chronic cystic/alveolar organ disease; recurrence after surgery

top_drug_detail.moa: Oral regimen for T. b. gambiense (first- and second-stage)

top_target_detail.name: potassium voltage-gated channel subfamily A member 1

post_acute_syndrome: Neuropsychiatric / sleep-cycle sequelae after CNS-stage disease

top_drug_detail.moa: Mycobacterial RNA polymerase / protein synthesis inhibition

top_target_detail.name: heat shock protein family D (Hsp60) member 1

post_acute_syndrome: Contractures, deformity, functional limitation after healing
Chronic peripheral neuropathy, disability, immune-mediated reactions (ENL/type-1)
Chronic destructive skin/bone/cartilage lesions if untreated

top_drug_detail.moa: Manual worm extraction + water filtration; near-eradication

top_target_detail.name: transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily V member 3

post_acute_syndrome: Transient joint involvement; no defined post-acute syndrome (near eradication)

disease: Mycetoma, chromoblastomycosis and other deep mycoses

top_target_detail.name: cytochrome P450 family 51 subfamily A member 1

post_acute_syndrome: Chronic progressive subcutaneous destruction, disability, amputation
Severe facial disfigurement, trismus, functional (eating/speech) impairment in survivors
note: Added to WHO NTD list December 2023 (21st NTD).
